# hgstack

A public, curated subset of the AI coding stack used by Hourglass (an AI-native services company in Melbourne) to run internal automations and ship client AI projects.

This repository contains agent skills, hooks, rules, and statuslines as plain markdown / shell files. There is no runtime, framework, or package to install. Each skill is self-contained in its own directory and includes its own setup notes. Currently optimised for Claude Code; the file format is portable to any agent that reads files (Codex, Aider, Cursor, OpenCode, etc.).

## Where to start

- `README.md`  -  human entry point, install instructions, what's inside.
- `skills/`  -  individual skills, each with a `SKILL.md`. Names without a prefix are general-purpose; the `hg-` prefix marks Hourglass team practices.
- `docs/`  -  ethos and principles (coming as we ship them).

## Naming conventions

- `hg-*`  -  Hourglass team-tested skill / hook / practice. Curated from our internal stack.
- (unprefixed)  -  general-purpose skill. Useful regardless of team.

## Install

```bash
git clone https://github.com/f3kin/hgstack.git ~/repos/hgstack
ln -s ~/repos/hgstack/skills/<name> ~/.claude/skills/<name>
```

Symlink rather than copy, so `git pull` updates your installed skills.
